steps.title: Welcome to RLC Café POS! ☕
steps.content: This tutorial will walk you through everything you need to know as a cashier. The café is open and ready — let's go!

steps.title: The Order Board
steps.content: This is your main workspace. Orders flow left to right: PENDING (new orders) → PREPARING (being made) → READY (waiting for collection). Orders with a 💰 badge means the customer has already paid via receipt.

steps.title: Step 1: Approve an Order
steps.content: Sarah has placed an order and shown her payment receipt. When you see a PENDING order with a receipt badge, it means already paid. Tap Approve to confirm and start preparing her drink.

steps.title: Order Approved! ✓
steps.content: Great! Sarah's order moved to PREPARING. The barista will now make her drink. Notice it moved from the left column to the middle.

steps.title: Oops! Undo a Mistake
steps.content: Made a mistake? You can undo a PREPARING order back to PENDING. Let's try — we'll undo Sarah's order.

steps.title: Undo Complete! ↩️
steps.content: Sarah's order is back in PENDING. This is useful if you approved the wrong order or need to hold it. Let's approve it again to continue.

steps.title: Step 2: Mark Ready
steps.content: The barista finished Sarah's Latte! Tap the order and mark it Ready to notify her that it's waiting for collection.

steps.title: Order Ready! 🎉
steps.content: Sarah will receive a push notification on her phone. The order is now in the READY column. When she arrives to collect...

steps.title: Step 3: Collect / Archive
steps.content: Sarah is here! Tap the ready order and tap Collected to complete the transaction.

steps.title: Order Complete! ✅
steps.content: Done! The order disappears from the board. Sarah has her coffee. Let's learn about cancelling orders next.

steps.title: Step 4: Cancel an Order
steps.content: Sometimes you need to cancel — wrong order, customer changed mind, etc. Daniel's order is still pending. Let's cancel it with a reason.

steps.title: Order Cancelled ❌
steps.content: The order is removed. A reason is logged for admin review. Always provide a brief reason when cancelling.

steps.title: Step 5: Walk-up Orders
steps.content: A customer at the counter wants to order directly (no phone). Tap Walk-up to create their order. You'll pick drinks, set quantities, and enter their name.

steps.title: Walk-up Created! 📝
steps.content: Walk-up orders skip PENDING and go straight to PREPARING (since the cashier already confirmed it). The customer pays at the counter.

steps.title: Step 6: Celebration Mode 🎉
steps.content: On special days (birthdays, events), toggle Celebration Mode. All eligible drinks are discounted to a fixed price (e.g. RM 5). Customers see the discount automatically.

steps.title: Celebration Active! 🎊
steps.content: The banner shows at the top. All eligible drinks are now discounted. Toggle it again when the event ends. Let's turn it off.

steps.title: Step 7: Menu Toggle
steps.content: Sold out of something? Tap Menu to enable/disable items for today. Disabled items won't appear on the customer order screen.

steps.title: Step 8: Stock Count
steps.content: At the start/end of shift, do a stock count. Tap Stock Count, select a location (fridge or storeroom), and enter current quantities.

steps.title: Step 9: Handover
steps.content: Switching shifts mid-service? Tap Handover to hand over to the next cashier. This logs who was on duty and notes any issues.

steps.title: Step 10: Close Café
steps.content: End of service! Tap Close Café to close. This runs the closing checklist, expires pending orders, resets the featured drink, and sends the daily summary.

steps.title: Step 11: Open Café
steps.content: At the start of service, tap Open Café. This runs the opening checklist — confirm stock, set up station, enable the menu.

steps.title: Training Complete! 🎓
steps.content: You're ready to serve! Remember: you can always tap 📖 Rerun Tutorial in the sidebar if you need a refresher. Welcome to the team!
